name: This Chicken Got Hands
short_description: Step into the "feathery" shoes of the boldest chicken ever in This Chicken Got Hands! An action arcade fighting game where you will be fighting against hordes of enemies, and destroying property to achieve a single goal of saving your eggs.
detailed_description:
This chicken got hands is an action arcade fighting game where you will be fighting against hordes of enemies to achieve a single goal of saving your eggs.

Step into the "feathery" shoes of the boldest chicken ever in This Chicken Got Hands! In this action-packed, adrenaline-fueled game, you take on the role of a blue and pink chicken on a mission to rescue your stolen eggs from the clutches of a sneaky farmer. But this isn’t just any rescue operation, prepare to destroy, smash, and wreak havoc to get your eggs back!

Be careful, some of his guys are really tough, you must be tactical enough in finding food to restore your health, and keeping your energy at a steady rate to use your special abilities.
